nasb.text: To Isaac I gave Jacob and Esau, and to Esau I gave Mount Seir to possess it; but Jacob and his sons went down to Egypt.

esv.text: And to Isaac I gave Jacob and Esau. And I gave Esau the hill country of Seir to possess, but Jacob and his children went down to Egypt.

cnv.text: 又把雅各和以掃賜給以撒，把西珥山賜給以掃作產業；雅各和他的子孫卻下到埃及去。

ccb.text: 把雅各和以扫赐给以撒，把西珥山赐给以扫作产业，雅各和他的子孙则去了埃及。
